name: formspec-engine
description: Client-side form state engine with FEL expression language, reactive signals, and validation

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/formspec-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/formspec-engine/wasm-pkg --no-opt && wasm-opt -Os --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-simd wasm-pkg/formspec_wasm_bg.wasm -o wasm-pkg/formspec_wasm_bg.wasm
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit
